title: stachys balcanica
intro: Stachys balcanica, also known as Balkan woundwort or Balkan hedgenettle, is a perennial plant species within the mint family (Lamiaceae). It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of wounds, burns, and skin irritations, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and providing antioxidant effects. Stachys balcanica can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and ointments, making it a versatile remedy in traditional medicine.
